title: 20 Plastic Tumblers 12oz
description: Clear Plastic Half Pint Tumblers. Both reusable and disposable. These 12oz flexible plastic glasses are ideal for parties and other special occasions, serving cold drinks to guests and kids. **Not suitable for hot drinks**
